handoff.reason: WO authored from stub; ready for CORE implementation per phased plan (5 phases, 16 tasks).

execution_rules.phase_gates: Each phase has a halt gate; do not proceed without explicit gate satisfaction. Phase 1 requires implementer+reviewer agreement on fix shape before Phase 2 src/ touch.
execution_rules.atomic_commits: One commit per phase task that produces a code/test artifact (target ~5 atomic commits across phases 2-5).
execution_rules.tsc_invariant: tsc --noEmit must be clean both configs after every src/ change — Phase 2 gate.

hard_constraints: Phase 7 archive must NOT be reopened (rebuild is COMPLETE)
No new field on IndexingResult schema

communication_log.summary: WO-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 authored from STUB-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001. Plan-type=phased, 5 phases, 16 tasks, AC-01..AC-06. Ready for ORCHESTRATOR to dispatch CODEREF-CORE for execute.

Phase 5 dynamic re-verification: fix verified correct (0→215 chunks correctly skip of 262 missing-header files; was catastrophic 0/262 pre-fix). 8/8 unit + 4/4 invariant + 12/12 ground-truth+boundary all PASS, tsc clean both configs. AC-02 ±10% threshold misses by 17.9% — but the 47-file residual gap is structural: rag-index analyzerService.analyze() produces a smaller graph than populate-coderef graph.json. 3 paths surfaced for ruling.

Path A authorized: land the verified-correct fix; mark AC-02 DIVERGED with structural rationale; file follow-up stub (rag-index analyzer-slice coverage divergence vs populate-coderef graph.json) as priority=high, owner=CODEREF-CORE; Phase 7 archive NOT reopened; closeout report + push.

WO-INDEXING-ORCHESTRATOR-PATH-NORMALIZATION-001 closed under Path A. Commits: a38a5b4 (fix), 2dcc2a6 (unit test 8/8), 989d05b (invariant 4/4), + closeout. AC-01/03/04/05/06 PASS; AC-02 DIVERGED with stub-002 filed. Standing by for ORCHESTRATOR to dispatch SKILLS for cross-project /close-workorder.

decisions_log.rationale: Phased plan_type selected: bug fix with halt gates between code, tests, and dynamic verification.

WO halt-and-report condition triggered: 'reproduction reveals a different root cause'. Path-normalization fix verified correct in isolation; residual ±10% miss is rag-index analyzer slice vs populate-coderef graph.json coverage divergence (47 of 262 missing-header files don't reach the rag-index analyzer at all).

Path A authorized. (B) post-hoc threshold relax sets wrong precedent. (C) violates locked diff radius + DR-PHASE-7-B. (A) lands the load-bearing 0→215 improvement and pushes the analyzer-slice gap to its own scoped follow-up WO.
